zh.of Alvingham Lnclns Engl: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆
zh.Alvingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆
zh.Alvingham, Lincolnshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Barnabe Gooch I於1541年6月出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Gooch21歲，母親Margaret Mantell22歲。他於1563年1月24日與Mary Darell在英國肯特坎特布瑞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年2月5日享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barnabe Gooch I于1541年6月出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Gooch21岁，母亲Margaret Mantell22岁。他于1563年1月24日与Mary Darell在英国肯特坎特布瑞结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年2月5日享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gooch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gough
meanings: Welsh: from coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’. The mutated form goch is normal after a personal name. In England, where the surname occurs from Welsh migration, it may have become hereditary in medieval times but this development was probably much later in Wales. Compare Gooch and Couch , which may sometimes derive from the same source.
Irish (especially Waterford and Dublin): shortened form of   McGough  .

variants.name: Gouge
meanings: English: variant of   Gooch   or   Couch  .

variants.name: Googe
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Gooch  .

variants.name: Couch
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Barnabe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Barnabas
meanings: From the New Testament, where Barnabas represents a Greek form of an Aramaic name meaning ‘son of consolation’. St Barnabas was a Jewish Cypriot, one of the earliest Christian missionaries, who sold his property and gave the proceeds to the Church. He worked with St Paul until about ad 48 .

en.lifeSummary: When Barnabe Gooch I was born in June 1541, in Alvingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Gooch, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Mantell, was 22. He married Mary Darell on 24 January 1563, in Canterbury, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 February 1593, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barnabe Gooch I est né en juin 1541, à Alvingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Gooch, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mantell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mary Darell le 24 janvier 1563, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 février 1593, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barnabe Gooch I im Juni 1541 in Alvingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Gooch 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Mantell 22. Er hat am 24. Januar 1563 in Canterbury, Kent, England Mary Darell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Februar 1593 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barnabe Gooch I è nato il nel giugno 1541 nel Alvingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Gooch, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mantell, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mary Darell il 24 gennaio 1563, nel Canterbury, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1593, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Barnabe Gooch Iが1541年6月にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルヴィンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Goochは21歳，母Margaret Mantellは22歳であった。1563年1月24日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーでMary Darellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年2月5日に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Barnabe Gooch I(이)가 1541년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 앨빙함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Gooch(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mantell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1563년 1월 24일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 Mary Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 2월 5일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barnabe Gooch I nasceu em junho de 1541, em Alvingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Gooch, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mantell, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Darell em 24 de janeiro de 1563, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1593, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barnabe Gooch I родился июнь 1541 г. в местности алвингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Gooch было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mantell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Darell 24 января 1563 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 февраля 1593 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barnabe Gooch I nació en junio de 1541, en Alvingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Gooch, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Mantell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mary Darell el 24 de enero de 1563, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1593, a la edad de 51 años.
